title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an open source AI model for generating high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates PiD's capabilities, installation, and workflows in ComfyUI, comparing it against alternatives like SeedVR2 and showing integration with Z-image for upscaling.
